source_pr.title: executor,store/tikv: fix data race
source_pr.body: Fix a data race in test code of last PR.

root_cause_explanation: The flakiness/race issue was caused by unsafely clearing/replacing the TiKV store's shared RegionCache from test code while other goroutines could still be using it, leading to a data race. This PR stabilizes the test by removing the ClearRegionCache helper and its usage so the shared cache is not replaced concurrently.
fix_pattern: Avoid racy mutation/replacement of shared TiKV store internals in tests (e.g., do not reset/replace the RegionCache while requests may be in-flight; remove or guard unsafe helpers).
